assessment.focus_note: Continued synthesis for 'Veritas Lens v0.1 Specification', focusing on verifying geopolitical claims regarding the Strait of Hormuz and infrastructure attacks, assessing the politicization of scientific evidence in moon landing discourse, and analyzing immigration policy impacts on national control. I will also monitor the evolving narratives around global power realignments.
